description: You are an urban economist at the San Francisco Controller's Office. Project the 5-year housing shortage (2020–2024) using the UrbanSim orca framework and the dataset at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. Quantify the net new housing units produced each year compared to expected household growth and document the cumulative shortfall. Model annual household growth (1–2% per year) and annual housing production from underdeveloped parcels where density is below zoning maximums, applying historical development probabilities. Record the results in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/housing_shortage.csv with columns: year, households_start, new_households, new_units, annual_deficit,
